name: podman-mcp
description: MCP server for managing Podman containers under WSL

list_containers.description: List all Podman containers (running and stopped). Pass running_only=true to get only running containers.

running_only.description: If true, returns only running containers (default: false)

run_container.description: Run a new Podman container with enforced resource limits and WSL2-safe defaults. Supports optional profiles: jvm-backend, frontend, db-dev, infra.

profile.description: Resource profile: jvm-backend | frontend | db-dev | infra

cpus.description: Override CPU limit (e.g. 2.0). Defaults to profile or 1

memory.description: Override memory limit (e.g. 512m). Defaults to profile or 512m

memory_swap.description: Override memory+swap limit. Defaults to same as memory

detach.description: Run container in background (-d). Default: true

extra_args.description: Additional raw arguments appended to the podman run command

start_container.description: Start a Podman container by name or ID

stop_container.description: Stop a running Podman container by name or ID

restart_container.description: Restart a Podman container by name or ID

logs_container.description: Get logs from a Podman container

podman_status.description: Check the status of the Podman rootless socket and daemon

healthcheck.description: Full health check: Podman socket, running containers, and key service ports

repair_podman_socket.description: Repairs the rootless Podman socket by recreating /run/user/<uid> with correct permissions and restarting the socket service. Use when Podman fails with errors about a missing /run/user directory.
